name: Honey Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted butter, honey, prepared mustard, lemon juice, and paprika in a bowl. Stir until well mixed.
2. Lightly sprinkle the chicken with salt and pepper.
3. Place the chicken pieces, meaty side down, in a lightly greased 12 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish.
4. Pour the honey mixture over the chicken.
5. Cover the dish and refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours.
6. Remove the chicken from the refrigerator.
7. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes with the cover on.
8. Remove the cover and turn the chicken pieces.
9. Continue baking an additional 30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through, basting occasionally with pan drippings.
Microwave Directions:
1. Combine the melted butter, honey, prepared mustard, lemon juice, and paprika in a bowl. Stir until well mixed.
2. Lightly sprinkle the chicken with salt and pepper.
3. Place the chicken pieces, meaty side down, in a lightly greased 12 x 8 x 2-inch baking dish.
4. Pour the honey mixture over the chicken.
5. Cover the dish tightly with heavy-duty plastic wrap.
6. Microwave at HIGH for 18 to 22 minutes or until the chicken pieces are cooked through, rotating the dish a quarter turn and basting with sauce every 5 minutes.
